Sany Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6031) ) has issued an update.

Sany Heavy Industry Co., Ltd. has announced an extraordinary general meeting scheduled for December 30, 2025, to discuss significant amendments to its corporate governance and operational procedures. The meeting will address proposals such as abolishing the Board of Supervisors, amending the Articles of Association, and revising various internal management systems. These changes indicate Sany’s strategic efforts to streamline its governance structure and enhance operational efficiency, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

The latest announcement is out from Royale Home Holdings Limited ( (HK:1198) ).

Royale Home Holdings Limited announced a change in the composition of its Nomination Committee in response to the revised Corporate Governance Code effective from July 2025.
